name: Papsud
message: Papsud is a company that operates in the Office Products Retail & Distribution industry. It employs 10to19 people and has 1Mto5M of revenue. The company is headquartered in Marseille, Provence-Alpes-Cote d'Azur, France - 100GB of data taking include gov billing and costumers infos, invoices and IDs details etc
